title: helianthemum tuberaria var. alpestre
intro: Helianthemum tuberaria var. alpestre, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rockrose include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote wound healing. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile plant for various health remedies.
